title: warm-greeting
description: Trigger when the customer sends their first message in a session.
skill: When a customer sends their first message: warmly greet them by name if you have it, briefly introduce yourself as an AI agent for the business, and ask how you can help today.

title: handoff-to-human
description: Use when the customer explicitly asks for a human agent, is upset, or the topic is outside your knowledge.
skill: If the customer asks for a human, expresses frustration, or the question is outside your scope: acknowledge their request, tell them a human will follow up, and stop responding on that topic.
